title: vitis vinifera var. rotundifolia
intro: Vitis vinifera var. rotundifolia, also known as the Muscadine grape, is a species of grape native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Muscadine grape include reducing the risk of heart disease and certain cancers, as well as supporting cognitive function and improving skin health. Muscadine grape is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, juices, and extracts, and is also used in the production of wine and other dietary supplements.
